stories.title: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
stories.summary: Buildings were flattened in the capital Caracas, where voices have been heard calling from the rubble.

stories.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
stories.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

stories.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
stories.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

stories.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
stories.summary: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.

stories.title: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
stories.summary: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".

stories.title: Oil price falls back to pre-Iran war levels
stories.summary: Signs that traffic through the key Strait of Hormuz shipping route is gradually resuming has helped to push the oil price down.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Core inflation rate hit 3.4% in May, highest since October 2023, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
stories.summary: The personal consumption expenditures price index was expected to show a 4.1% annual increase.

stories.title: Trump pledges rapid U.S. response for Venezuela after historic earthquakes kill hundreds
stories.summary: The swift U.S. offer of assistance reflects a degree of diplomatic realignment between the Trump administration and the Venezuelan interim government.

stories.title: Iran warns ships it's 'unacceptable and dangerous' to transit the Strait of Hormuz without their approval
stories.summary: The stern warning underscores Tehran's resolve to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz and to resist transits that bypass its authorization.

stories.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
stories.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

stories.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
stories.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.

stories.title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
stories.summary: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.

stories.title: The "sad inevitability" of Europe's heat wave
stories.summary: Europeans are baking under their second heat wave of the summer.

stories.title: New effort will get genome sequences for entire Endangered Species list
stories.summary: Colossal Biosciences will be biobanking tissues from all of them as well.

stories.title: Every Homo naledi we know of is female, and the implications are fascinating
stories.summary: "There is no natural explanation," says paleoanthropologist John Hawks.

stories.title: IBM claims world’s first sub-1 nanometer chip technology
stories.summary: IBM’s nanostack transistors could boost chip performance or energy efficiency.

stories.title: Hotly anticipated Grand Theft Auto VI will cost more than other AAA games
stories.summary: GTA6 might be an outlier, though—at least for now.

stories.title: OpenAI and Broadcom announce chip designed for LLM inference at scale
stories.summary: The silicon race is heating up amid the struggle to keep up with demand.

stories.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
stories.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

stories.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
stories.summary: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

stories.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
stories.summary: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

stories.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
stories.summary: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

stories.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
stories.summary: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.

stories.title: Circle, Nomura eye Japan corporate FX with stablecoin settlement: Report
stories.summary: Circle and Nomura are reportedly partnering to enable stablecoin-based foreign exchange settlement for Japanese companies as the country's regulated blockchain-based financial infrastructure expands.

stories.title: Public invited to pay tribute to David Hockney
stories.summary: A book of condolence opens to allow people to pay tribute to David Hockney at Bradford City Hall.

stories.summary: The forthcoming BBC six-part drama Hamburg Days charts the growth of the band from their beginnings.

stories.title: Top Australian TV star to leave job after Tommy Robinson interview, reports say

stories.title: GTA 6 will cost £70 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
stories.summary: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.

stories.title: Quentin Tarantino and Kylie Minogue spotted around Wales for new film
stories.summary: Quentin Tarantino, Kylie Minogue and RZA are just three of the names filming a new drama set in Wales.
